name: scikit-image

performance.notes: CPU-based; fast for most operations; some algorithms can be slow for large images

agent_readiness.notes: Image processing library for scientific Python. Comprehensive classical image processing: filtering, morphology, segmentation, feature detection, transforms, color space conversion, restoration, exposure, edge detection. Works on NumPy arrays. Integration with SciPy/Matplotlib. Canny edge detection, Hough transforms, SIFT/ORB features, watershed segmentation, active contours. Not for deep learning — use for classical image processing in scientific workflows.

gotchas: Not for deep learning-based vision (use OpenCV/torchvision)
Some complex algorithms can be slow
API can be inconsistent across modules
best_when: Classical image processing in scientific Python workflows
Scientific image analysis (microscopy, medical imaging, astronomy)
summary: scikit-image is the scientific Python image processing library. Comprehensive classical algorithms: filtering, morphology, segmentation, feature detection, color conversion, and more. Works on NumPy arrays. Excellent documentation. Best for scientific image analysis (microscopy, medical imaging) and classical image processing in the NumPy ecosystem. Not for deep learning CV — use OpenCV or torchvision.
